summary: Iteration 79: Tested Messages tab move from Loyalty page to Ratings page. Backend tests 13/13 PASSED. Frontend verification: Loyalty page correctly has 3 tabs (no Messages), Ratings page has 2 tabs (My Reviews + Messages), Messages tab has Alerts/Notifications sub-tabs. Fixed Layout.jsx syntax error (extra brace). Deep-link redirects /alerts and /notifications configured in App.jsx lines 908-909.

integration_issues.issue: Routes configured correctly in App.jsx but couldn't fully verify via browser automation due to location modal overlay

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Layout.jsx line 809: Had }}} instead of }} - syntax error causing blank page
CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx line 130: grid-cols-3 with 3 tabs (My Rewards, Activity, Rewards) - correct
Ratings.jsx lines 2357-2372: Customer view has 2 tabs (ratings, messages) with MessagesTab integration
App.jsx lines 908-909: Navigate redirects for /alerts and /notifications to /ratings?tab=messages configured
useSidebarMenu.js: Customer sidebar has no standalone 'Messages' - only 'My Ratings' link

success_rate.frontend: 95% (main features verified, redirect test blocked by location modal)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Messages moved from Loyalty (3 tabs) to Ratings (2 tabs: My Reviews + Messages). Messages tab has Alerts/Notifications sub-tabs. /alerts and /notifications routes redirect to /ratings?tab=messages. Backend action_url includes item ID for deep-linking. Note: Location modal appears for new customers on first visit - may need to dismiss during testing.

messages_tab.component: MessagesTab with highlightId and initialSubTab props

deep_linking.auto_scroll: MessagesTab uses data-item-id attribute and scrollIntoView with ring highlight

bugs_fixed.impact: Caused frontend parsing error and blank page
